candidates.title: Run NVIDIA Nemotron and OpenAI GPT OSS models on Amazon Bedrock in AWS GovCloud (US)
candidates.summary: We're excited to introduce US-based frontier open-weight models in AWS GovCloud (US). With this release, Amazon Bedrock now supports OpenAI’s open-weight GPT OSS models (120B and 20B) and NVIDIA Nemotron (Nano 9B v2, Nano 12B v2, Nano 30B, Super 120B) models. In this post, we cover these models and their capabilities, the inference options for data residency, the available service tiers and how to get started.

candidates.title: Simplify model selection in Amazon Bedrock with the open source Model Profiler
candidates.summary: The Amazon Bedrock Model Profiler is an open source tool that aggregates model metadata from multiple AWS APIs and external sources into a single, searchable interface. In this post, you’ll learn what the Model Profiler provides, the real-world scenarios it supports, and how to deploy it in your own environment in under five minutes.

candidates.title: Microsoft launches its own AI deployment company with $2.5 billion commitment
candidates.summary: Microsoft follows Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic with its new AI deployment group.

candidates.title: OpenAI proposed donating 5% of its equity to a US sovereign wealth fund
candidates.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company’s equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the AI boom.

candidates.title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
candidates.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.

candidates.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
candidates.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
